items.key: (@@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

items.key: bp_ref like case when '{$%c[bp_ref]}' <> '' then '{$%c[bp_ref]}%' else '''' end and status = '1'
items.check: bp_ref like case when '{$%c[bp_ref]}' <> '' then '{$%c[bp_ref]}%' else '''' end

command.text:
declare @i int, @day int, @showField varchar(4000), @hideField varchar(4000), @d varchar(512), @denyEdit varchar(33), @denyMessage nvarchar(4000), @maxDay int, @keyDept nvarchar(4000), @keyData nvarchar(4000)
select @denyEdit = 'this.grid._denyEdit = false;', @denyMessage = '', @d = '', @showField = '', @hideField = '', @day = datediff(day,@tu_ngay, @den_ngay), @i = 0, @maxDay = 36 if @day > @maxDay - 1 set @day = @maxDay - 1
if exists (select 1 from dmstt where ngay_ks >= @tu_ngay) begin select @denyEdit = 'this.grid._denyEdit = true;' select @denyMessage = N'this.grid._denyMessage = ''' + case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày khóa sổ.' else N'Data is locked, you must modify system locked date.' end + ''';' end
if exists(select 1 from dmstt where @tu_ngay <= ngay_gh2 and @den_ngay >= ngay_gh1) begin select top 0 ma_bp, ngay into #ngaynghi from hrdmngaynghi select @keyDept = 'bp_ref like ''' + replace(@bp_ref, '''', '') + '%''', @keyData = 'a.status = 1 and a.ngay between ''' + convert(char(8), @tu_ngay, 112) + ''' and ''' + convert(char(8), @den_ngay, 112) + '''' insert into #ngaynghi exec FastBusiness$HRM$DepartmentGetData @keyDept, 'hrdmngaynghi', 'ngay', @keyData, '', 0
select @d = @d + convert(char(8),ngay, 112) + ',' from #ngaynghi select @d = substring(@d, 0, len(@d)) end
while @i <= @day begin select @i = @i + 1 select @showField = @showField + case when @showField = '' then '' else ',' end + 'n' + replace(str(@i, 2), ' ', 0) end while @i < @maxDay begin select @i = @i + 1 select @hideField = @hideField + case when @hideField = '' then '' else ',' end + 'n' + replace(str(@i, 2), ' ', 0) end
select '' as field, '' as message, @denyEdit + @denyMessage + 'this.grid._nonWorking = ''' + @d + ''';this.grid._showFields =''' + @showField + ''';this.grid._hiddenFields =''' + @hideField + ''';this.grid._dateFrom=new Date(''' + convert(varchar(10), @tu_ngay, 111) + ''');this.grid._dateTo=new Date(''' + convert(varchar(10), @den_ngay, 111) + ''');remove$GridReport$Filter(this.grid);' as script return

action.text: declare @b varchar(128) select @b = '' if exists(select 1 from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp) select @b = bp_ref from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp select @b as value return
